name: Crumb Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Baking powder, pinch of salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble shortening into sugar and flour.
2. Reserve three-quarters of the mixture for topping.
3. To the remaining dry ingredients, add shortening, sour milk, and beaten egg.
4. Mix well and place in a deep, 8-inch square baking dish.
5. Cover with the reserved three-quarters cup crumbs.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes or until done.
